title: Apollo Edge
description: A directed edge in the Apollo knowledge graph. Represents a relationship between two nodes.

source.description: Node ID of the edge origin.

target.description: Node ID of the edge destination.

type.description: The kind of relationship this edge represents.

call_args.description: Actual arguments passed at the call site. Present on 'calls' edges.

call_line.description: Line number of the call site. Present on 'calls' edges.
